Real Problems We Solve Daily

Challenges Facing Dubai Businesses Right Now

From work-from-home headaches to branch connectivity, telephony drop-outs to camera faults — click any card to see how we fix it fast.

Work From Home & VPN Issues

↻ tap

WFH & VPN Fix

Slow VPN, dropped connections, remote desktop problems. We configure site-to-site VPN, split tunneling & secure remote access so your team works seamlessly from anywhere.

Branch-to-Branch Connectivity

↻ tap

Branch Networking

Inter-office connectivity via SD-WAN, MPLS, or site-to-site VPN. We link all your UAE branches securely so files, calls and systems work as one.

Telephony & Softphone Issues

↻ tap

VoIP & PBX Solutions

Call drops, echo, no dial tone — we configure Yeastar, Grandstream, Panasonic & 3CX. Softphone apps (Zoiper, MicroSIP, 3CX client) integrated with your existing PBX.

CCTV Camera & Recording Issues

↻ tap

Camera & Surveillance Fix

No recording, offline cameras, NVR/DVR issues, remote viewing problems. We service, reconfigure and install IP & analog camera systems across Dubai.

Server Health & Data Security

↻ tap

Server & Data Protection

Slow servers, disk failures, backup failures. We monitor server health, configure RAID, set up automated cloud + local backups, and harden Windows Server security.

Antivirus & Endpoint Security

↻ tap

All-Device Protection

We deploy enterprise antivirus covering Windows Server, Windows 10/11, Mac, Chromebook & Linux. Centralised management via Microsoft Defender or Sophos.

WiFi Speed & Range Problems

↻ tap

WiFi Solutions

Dead zones, slow speeds, interference issues. We design and deploy enterprise WiFi with Ubiquiti, TP-Link EAP, Aruba or Cisco access points across your office.

Printer Troubleshooting & AMC

↻ tap

Printer Support & AMC

Paper jams, offline errors, network printer issues. Full troubleshooting for HP, Canon, Epson, Ricoh. Printer AMC plans from AED 150/year including toner check.

Biometric, Door Access & Attendance

↻ tap

Access Control Solutions

Fingerprint/face recognition devices, RFID door access, attendance management software with exportable reports. ZKTeco, HID, Hikvision and more.

MDM — Mobile Device Management

↻ tap

Microsoft Intune MDM

Enrol and manage Windows, iOS, Android & Mac devices. Enforce encryption, remote wipe, app deployment, Autopilot zero-touch, and compliance policies.

Email Security & Hosting

↻ tap

Email Security & Hosting

Spam filtering, phishing protection, DKIM/SPF/DMARC setup, Microsoft 365 or Zoho Mail hosting. Business email from AED 10/user/month.

Laptop / PC Repair & Upgrades

↻ tap

Hardware Repair

Screen replacement, SSD/RAM upgrades, keyboard repair, motherboard diagnostics, data recovery. All brands serviced. Same/next day turnaround in Dubai.

Our Ticketing System — Every Issue Tracked & Documented

Every support request raised with Easetech Solutions is automatically logged in our ticketing system. Each ticket includes the date, engineer assigned, steps taken, resolution, and follow-up notes. You can always request a copy of your ticket history. Nothing is ever forgotten, and no issue falls through the cracks.
